0:["z9YOWyh9PTcSuPCrwx27d",[[["",{"children":["how-it-works",{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],["",{"children":["how-it-works",{"children":["__PAGE__",{},[["$L1",[["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-5","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-[28px] sm:text-[30px] font-bold leading-[1.15] tracking-tight text-foreground","style":{"maxWidth":"26ch"},"children":"How the leaderboard is produced"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2.5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","style":{"maxWidth":"64ch"},"children":"A short walkthrough — from raw task to final Elo. Every agent answers the same questions on the same sealed data; a deterministic scorer compares answers to a hidden URL/quote pool; pairwise battles become Bradley-Terry Elo."}]]}],["$","nav",null,{"className":"mb-5 flex items-center gap-1 overflow-x-auto border-b","aria-label":"Section nav","children":[["$","a","/",{"href":"/","className":"whitespace-nowrap px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground","children":["Leaderboard","$undefined"]}],["$","a","/how-it-works/",{"href":"/how-it-works/","className":"whitespace-nowrap px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors border-foreground text-foreground font-semibold","children":["Methodology","$undefined"]}],["$","a","/contribute/",{"href":"/contribute/","className":"whitespace-nowrap px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground","children":["Reproduce","$undefined"]}],["$","a","/about/",{"href":"/about/","className":"whitespace-nowrap px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground","children":["About","$undefined"]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-3 inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-accent/15 text-[11px] font-semibold text-accent","children":"1"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"The agents run on a sealed sandbox"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"No agent ever touches the real internet. The sandbox is three local services that look like Amazon, Reddit, and Wikipedia:"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl text-[13.5px] text-foreground/80 space-y-1.5","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["· ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Magento"}]," at ",["$","code",null,{"className":"num-mono","children":"localhost:7770"}]," — ~2,000 product pages."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["· ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Postmill"}]," at ",["$","code",null,{"className":"num-mono","children":"localhost:9999"}]," — Reddit-style forum threads."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["· ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kiwix"}]," at ",["$","code",null,{"className":"num-mono","children":"localhost:8090"}]," — offline Wikipedia."]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"Each task is a one-paragraph research prompt that requires citing ≥120 URLs across all three sources. The agent gets the prompt, nothing else, and writes a markdown report."}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-3 inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-accent/15 text-[11px] font-semibold text-accent","children":"2"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"Every report is scored on 7 pillars"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"The scorer reads the markdown report and produces seven sub-scores. Five are deterministic; two are LLM-judged with strict rubrics."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3","children":[["$","div","URL coverage",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"URL coverage"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"Did the agent cite the URLs that should be cited? Compares the agent's URLs against a hidden golden pool of must-cite + expected-pool URLs per task."}]]}],["$","div","URL reachability",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"URL reachability"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"Do the cited URLs actually resolve in the sandbox? Each URL is HTTP-probed. Hallucinated or fabricated URLs return 4xx/5xx."}]]}],["$","div","Quote match",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Quote match"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"When the agent quotes a page, does the page actually contain that text? Fuzzy match against the fetched content."}]]}],["$","div","Claim NLI",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Claim NLI"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"Are the agent's factual claims entailed by the cited page rather than contradicted or unrelated? NLI per claim."}]]}],["$","div","Checklist (LLM judge)",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Checklist (LLM judge)"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"A 21-item task-specific checklist evaluated by an LLM judge. Each item is a yes/no fact the report must contain."}]]}],["$","div","Citation alignment",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Citation alignment"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"For each cited URL, does the linked page actually support the surrounding claim? Per-citation precision/recall."}]]}],["$","div","Analysis + presentation",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Analysis + presentation"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"Two LLM-judge rubrics: whether the report goes beyond restating sources, and whether it is structured and readable."}]]}],["$","div","Spec compliance",{"className":"rounded-md bg-secondary p-3.5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-[13.5px] text-foreground","children":"Spec compliance"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-[12.5px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/75","children":"Hard-rule checks on word count, citation count, and paragraph count. Pass/fail per dimension; final spec score is the pass fraction."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-3 inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-accent/15 text-[11px] font-semibold text-accent","children":"3"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"The pillars combine into composite_v2"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"The headline number on the leaderboard:"}],["$","pre",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl overflow-x-auto rounded bg-primary p-3 text-[12px] text-primary-foreground","children":"composite_v2 = reachability · qm_factor · nli_factor\n                 · (0.40·url_coverage + 0.40·checklist + 0.20·spec)"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":["The key idea is the ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"multiplicative gate"}],". URL reachability, quote match, and claim NLI all multiply the quality score. If the agent fabricates URLs (reachability=0), the whole score is zero — no matter how fluent the prose. ",["$","em",null,{"children":"Truthfulness is non-negotiable."}]]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-3 inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-accent/15 text-[11px] font-semibold text-accent","children":"4"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"Pairwise battles → Bradley-Terry Elo"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":["For every task where two agents both have a valid score, we record a \"battle\" — whichever has the higher ",["$","code",null,{"className":"num-mono","children":"composite_v2"}]," wins. We fit a Bradley-Terry model (same as chess Elo) to the matrix of outcomes. Each agent gets a single Elo plus a 95% bootstrap CI."]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"Why pairwise instead of averaging the composite? Because composite scores are noisy and task-difficulty-correlated. Pairwise comparisons cancel out the per-task baseline."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/contribute/","children":["Reproduce on your machine",["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 12h14"}],["$","path","xquz4c",{"d":"m12 5 7 7-7 7"}],"$undefined"]}]],"className":"inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors 6:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"Methodology · Deep-Research Arena"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"An independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents — evaluated on a sealed sandbox of Magento, Postmill, and Wikipedia."}],["$","link","4",{"rel":"icon","href":"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 32 32'%3E%3Crect width='32' height='32' rx='6' fill='%23111827'/%3E%3Ctext x='50%25' y='55%25' fill='white' font-family='Inter,Arial' font-size='13' font-weight='700' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='middle'%3EDR%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E"}]]
